# prd-to-prod

> Policy-bounded AI execution system for software delivery.
> Humans own intent, policy, escalation, and authority expansion. AI operates only inside the pipeline lane.

## Core Artifacts
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) — coding standards, PR rules, and repository conventions
- [autonomy-policy.yml](autonomy-policy.yml) — machine-readable authority boundary
- [docs/decision-ledger/README.md](docs/decision-ledger/README.md) — decision event schema

## Workflow Groups
- Ingress and routing — `auto-dispatch`, `auto-dispatch-requeue`, `prd-decomposer`
- Execution lane — `repo-assist`, `pr-review-agent`, `pr-review-submit`
- Delivery and recovery — CI, deploy, failure routing, watchdog, issue cleanup
- Auxiliary governance — status reporting, diagnostics, simplification, duplication, security/compliance

## Operator Surfaces
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) — grouped architecture and boundary model
- [docs/SELF_HEALING_MVP.md](docs/SELF_HEALING_MVP.md) — bounded self-healing runbook
- `/operator` — queue, blocked actions, recent autonomous actions, metrics
- `/pipeline` — live GitHub-backed pipeline visualization

## Human-Owned Control Plane
- workflow files
- policy changes
- secrets and tokens
- deploy policy
- branch protection and merge-scope expansion
